title: Premium Agreement Pricing Terms
snippet: Premium agreement base fee is 120000 USD annually with a 12 percent volume discount above 5 million monthly requests and a 3-year renewal option at fixed uplift.

title: Contoso Liability Addendum
snippet: Contoso agreement liability cap is 2 times annual contract value with explicit exclusion for indirect damages and data migration delays.

title: Fabrikam Liability Addendum
snippet: Fabrikam agreement liability cap is 1 times annual contract value, but includes a separate breach remedy credit and narrower force majeure language.

title: Internal Premium Escalation Policy
snippet: Premium incidents receive a 15-minute response objective and mandatory executive notification for severity 1 outages over 30 minutes.
